name: Crypto Data API
description: Real-time cryptocurrency prices, market data, trending coins, historical data, and exchange info. Powered by CoinCap API with built-in caching.
long_description:
## Overview

Comprehensive cryptocurrency data API providing real-time prices, market data, trending coins, historical prices, exchange info, and global market statistics. Data sourced from CoinCap API with intelligent caching for optimal performance. Built on Cloudflare Workers.

## Key Features

- ✅ Real-time prices for multiple coins with currency conversion
- ✅ Detailed coin information (market cap, volume, supply, rank)
- ✅ Historical price lookup on any specific date
- ✅ Trending coins, market listings, and exchange rankings
- ✅ Global crypto market cap and volume statistics

## Use Cases

- **Crypto Dashboards**: Display real-time prices and portfolio values
- **Trading Bots**: Feed price data into algorithmic trading strategies
- **Portfolio Trackers**: Calculate holdings value with historical data
- **News & Media**: Show trending coins alongside market data
- **Financial Apps**: Integrate crypto prices into multi-asset platforms

## Quick Start

```
GET /price?ids=bitcoin,ethereum&vs=usd
```

Returns current prices, 24h change, market cap, and volume for each coin.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5.99 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $14.99 | 500,000 | 50/sec |
| Mega | $49.99 | 2,000,000 | 100/sec |

Free tier includes price lookup, search, and global stats. No credit card required.
